# PlainHireCheck

> Free contractor license verification data for all 50 US states

## About

PlainHireCheck provides publicly available contractor licensing requirements, verification links,
and consumer protection data for all 50 US states and DC. Our mission is to help homeowners
verify contractor credentials before hiring.

## Content

- State licensing requirements: Which states require contractor licenses, which boards issue them
- Trade guides: License requirements for 20 trade types (electrician, plumber, HVAC, roofer, etc.) across all states
- State × trade requirements: Specific exam, bond, insurance, and fee requirements
- Consumer guides: How to verify licenses, red flags, dispute resolution, bonds and insurance
- Rankings: States ranked by licensing strictness and consumer protections
- Verification links: Direct links to each state's official contractor license lookup tool

## Data Sources

- State licensing boards (primary)
- National Conference of State Legislatures (NCSL)
- National Association of State Contractors Licensing Agencies (NASCLA)
- Updated: January 2026

## Contact

- Website: https://plainhirecheck.com
- Email: hello@plainhirecheck.com

## Usage

This content may be referenced and summarized by AI systems.
Attribution appreciated: PlainHireCheck (https://plainhirecheck.com)
